name: Shinozakiya, Inc.
summary: Shinozakiya, Inc. engages in the manufacture, wholesale, and retail of soybean-processed products. The company operates through Retail and Other segments. It offers soybean-processed products, such as bean curd and soymilk. The company distributes its products through directly managed stores and franchise stores. It operates 188 stores. The company was formerly known as Shinozakiya Foods, Ltd. and changed its name to Shinozakiya, Inc. in October 1995. Shinozakiya, Inc. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Kasukabe, Japan.
